sentences.text: Good morning!
Oh, can you hear me?
Let's see, is this something I am doing on my end?
I cannot hear you for some reason.
Here, I'm gonna chat you.
That is so weird, …
Occasionally, but I think there's something wrong with my computer auto.
Okay.
Okay, hello, can you hear me?
Hi, yes.
Hi, I'm so sorry, Olivia.
It's okay, I think it's my laptop, so… that's fun.
Which, I feel like the audio, there's, like… I feel like that's… always, like, the trickiest part for me.
So I am so sorry for that inconvenience, but hello!
How are you this morning?
I'm good, how about yourself?
Good, I am doing well.
Thank you for asking.
You're in Indy, right?
Yes.
Okay, okay, amazing.
My fiance's family lives in Bloomington, so I've spent some time up there.
Yeah.
Okay, well, I appreciate you taking the time to chat today, about our Google Business Profile Automation Tool.
I took a peek at a few of your profiles, and it looks like, this might be right in line with what y'all are doing currently, as far as an automation piece.
So I'm excited to chat more about that.
I just have a few questions on the front end, and then at the end, we can decide if we want to keep the conversation going, or reconnect down the road, or what have you.
Does that sound good?
Yeah.
Okay, perfect!
Before I hop in, do you have any questions, or…?
Okay, okay, perfect.
Was there anything that piqued your interest in taking the call today?
I mean, just automation on Google Business is always interesting to hear about, so open to a conversation.
Okay, perfect.
Alright.
How many properties are in the portfolio overall?
We have 24.
24, okay, got it.
And I did take a peek, it looks like y'all own and manage all of them, is that correct?
Perfect.
Alright, love that from a marketing perspective as well, because it seems like third party is always kind of chaos to get anything approved there.
So, love that for y'all.
And as far as the Google business profiles go, are you the one that's doing the posts and stuff like that?
Yeah, we don't do a lot of posts, but when we do, that's me.
Okay, okay, perfect.
And I guess as far as, like, when you do post, is it oftentimes about concessions or specials, or kind of… okay.
Alright, got it.
Alright, have you evaluated any other vendors for Google Business Profile Automation?
Yeah, we used to use, I think it was Rentable, for the main thing they did was automatic Google posts.
Okay.
We just didn't see a lot of benefit from what they were posting.
It was kind of rinse and repeat information, and didn't provide a lot of value to our profile overall, so….
Okay, okay, got it.
Do you know, when y'all used Rentable for that?
what year?
… 2023, I believe.
Okay, got it, because, yeah, in full transparency, we rebranded, so we are rentable.
So we renamed Maven AI.

Since 2023, though, we were, white-labeling digital, and so we've completely taken it in-house now, so I'll show you what it looks like now, and I mean, there's… several new things that we're doing, because yeah, in 2023, we were basically just doing posts, and that was it.
So, excited to show you the updates we've made.
… And then, as far as, like, organic SEO, is there anything that you do, to kind of increase local SEO?
No, that's kind of just all manually on me.
We, use a lot with MozPro with tracking keywords and things like that, but as far as, … Having an outside vendor for that.
We don't really use anyone.
Okay, so you do keyword tracking, do y'all do PPC?
Okay, okay, got it, alright.
Okay, and then, your property management software, who do y'all use?
Alison Entrada.
Police, AI, and Entrata.
Okay, got it.
Well, I will go ahead and show my… share my screen and show you… The updates we've made, and what this looks like now.
So, yes, since y'all have used us, again, we've taken basically all of our technology in-house.
It's been really fun to watch us grow and expand.
So… now, in taking everything in-house, we've been able to expand our capabilities, and I'm not sure if you've heard this year, if you've been to, like, NAA or any of the big conferences.
Google's… Google has really placed a huge focus on increasing local organic SEO with the Google business profiles.
So, I would say, like, I've been with the company since 2022.
This has been a huge year for a focus.
From property management companies to really capitalize on that.
So Google still dominates search.
92% of searches done on the web are done starting on Google, with about 87% of renters starting their search for a new apartment on Google.

So, when they come across your profiles, we want to make sure that they're able to gather as much information as possible, about your property, and then, of course, also, we want to make sure that we can help paint a nice visual picture on what it's like to live at the property.
But beyond that is, that SEO piece.
So, Google rewards a well-kept Google Business profile with relevant, frequent, and unique content to the profile, with an increase in a local rank on Google Maps.
Of course, KPIs like property website traffic, impressions, that sort of thing.
So, everything that we do, of course, is going to increase that digital curb appeal, but then also help, renters gather as much information as possible on your properties.
The reason why we've continued to focus on this tool and expand, is because we've heard more and more about diminishing manpower nationwide.
Marketing teams are being asked for stronger results, oftentimes with fewer resources.
Sometimes on-site teams are asked to post and whatnot, and then ultimately the renter experience is not standardized, so… Cue our Google Business AI tool.

So the way that it works is we integrate with Entrada to do 4 things on your profiles daily, so… First and foremost, we're going to leverage your, photos and AI to create property and amenity-rich posts.
I'm excited to show you what they look like now versus what they did look like in 2023, because, yeah, it's a lot more property… property-focused, amenity-rich keywords, that sort of thing.
… We also pull over your available floor plans with the starting price once a day.
We help manage your Q&A feed, and then we post about concessions and specials when they're available.
So I will show you what that looks like.
Do you have any questions before I hop in?
So, with Versa, I noticed that y'all had the product speed.
Is this something, that you kind of, … like, put in once, and then just kind of leave it, or are these… are you manually updating all of this?
These should be manually updated, or automatically updated through, one of our vendors for PPC, actually.
Okay, okay, got it.
So, one of your vendors is able to get in here and update this?
Wow.
Which….
Is that….
It's our PPC vendor, he's a small, agency that we work for.
Okay, okay, got it.
Alright, so… I'll show you kind of how we compare.
So, wanted to pull up, one of S2 Residential's profiles.
I saw that you guys had a property in Dallas, so I wanted to pull this one up.
If we scroll down, so here are gonna be those posts.
So, I am sure this looks a little different as to, what they looked like in 2023.
So, again, we're gonna leverage your photos to make sure that we're showcasing exactly what you all want to showcase.
And then we leverage AI to, again, speak to the amenities in the photos that we're seeing.
Even if it's something like this, where it's kind of just… You know, a photo of a room.
We're highlighting the expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, sophisticated lighting.
So, everything that we do, we try to use as many amenity-rich keywords, so when someone is searching for apartments with a fitness center near me, you are more likely to come up on that search.
Any questions on that?
Do these look different?
They look pretty similar to what we were seeing.
Okay, because yeah, it's completely different as far as, like, the technology goes, since we have taken it in-house.
And then I did want to also show you… So, anytime y'all are offering concessions or specials.

We're gonna create a post about it once a week, so this will actually also populate in the, Q&A feed as well, but we'll post about it once a week, and then once the concession expires, we'll actually delete the post automatically, just to prevent anyone from referencing an outdated special.
One more note on that with y'all running, PBC campaigns, we can incorporate any keywords that y'all are focused on.
in our posts, and we also have now, with the AI, kind of rockin' and rollin' in 2025, we can, scrape your websites and learn your brand verbiage over time.
So that's been something that has been a huge resource for a lot of companies as well.
Any questions on any of that?
Okay.
So, here are going to be our products, feed.
So what we do here is we are going to integrate with Entrada to pull over your available floor plans once a day.

We can also showcase unavailable floor plans if you, would like, but… If you click in, it's gonna give a little bit more in-depth look of what that floor plan entails, which, you know, is a little bit more, broad of a description.
So it… It gives you an in-depth look of what that floor plan entails, and then if you click here, we're going to take y'all to the property website landing page.
So, again, we're increasing that property website traffic.
Something we can also do here, is we can add the community amenities.
So if this is something that y'all would want to showcase, we can further maximize the product's feed by including both in-unit, and property amenities as well.
Alright!
Our last piece is going to be the Q&A feed.
So, this… would also be a new update for y'all.
So, what we've done here is we looked at the most, frequently asked questions to multifamily Google business profiles.
And a lot of the times, we would notice that a question would be asked, and it would either never be answered, or it would be answered years later.
So, to get ahead of a prospective resident even needing to ask the questions.
What we've done is we place up to, 20 questions on the profile.
Of course, these are gonna be really property-specific.
We're not gonna put a question on there that doesn't make any sense for your property.
But these are gonna be amenities, availability, office hours, pet policy, rent specials, so on and so forth.
So what we do is we place these questions on your profile, and then, we're gonna edit the answer daily.
So, for example, does this property have any two bedrooms available?
It looks like this is gonna update in an hour.
As of August 18th, we have two bedrooms available to stay.
Even if the, answer doesn't change, we'll still update the answer, because Google does want to see that relevant, frequent, and unique content to reward you with an increase in SEO.
Alright, any questions on any of that?
No.
Okay!
So, yeah, what are you… what are your thoughts?

I know that you mentioned that you kind of felt that the post looked similar, but, you know, with those new additional features, the Q&A feed, the concessions, that sort of thing, do y'all… do you see this being a good fit for y'all, or…?
I definitely think this will be something we keep in mind.
I know we're working on budgets for next year.
I don't know if we'll have a place for it.
We do have a new hire coming in, and Google Business will be something she's kind of in on a day-to-day basis.
So, I do like that the questions are automated in that amenities feature.
I just think, with what we saw.
of an increase from our last test with Rentable, it wasn't… super viable, but I understand this, like, continues to become more important.

I know we have some budget set aside for some different things that we're looking to add on and test, so I don't know if this is something right now, … in our pipeline, just with what we have coming, for prioritization, so maybe next year this will be something I can keep in the back of mind, but definitely, like to see those changes with the amenities and the Q&A portions.
Yeah, yeah, no, it's a… it truly is a completely different tool from 2023.
But okay, great.
Well then, would there be a good time to reconnect with you down the road?
I mean, to be transparent, probably next year.
Around….
Sorry, I mean, like, when next year?
Is there, like, roughly a good month?
Probably beginning of August, that's when we start budgets.
Okay, got it.
All right, well, yes, please keep us in mind if anything changes, and I'll send over a recap, of course.
But I appreciate your time.
Yep, thank you, have a good one.
You too.
Bye.
